title: brachyscome xanthocarpa
intro: Brachyscome xanthocarpa, also known as yellow-flowered brachyscome, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family native to Western Australia. The medicinal properties of Brachyscome xanthocarpa lie in its ability to be used as a diuretic and to aid in treating kidney and bladder issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. Brachyscome xanthocarpa can be prepared for medicinal use in the form of a tea, infusion, or as a dried powder for capsules.
